scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run copy-assets
scripts.copy-assets: cp -r laya.js utils.min.js jump3d.max.js version.json unpack.json Role.ani JumpEffect_*.ani LayaScene_* game home settle sound font res dist/
scripts.cap:ios: pnpm build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:android: pnpm build && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:dev: CAPACITOR_DEV=true CAPACITOR_DEV_URL=http://$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 2>/dev/null || echo 'localhost'):5173 vite --host
